videos.title: localStorage and sessionStorage — Web Storage API Explained
videos.description: Comprehensive tutorial on the Web Storage API including localStorage and sessionStorage with practical examples of CRUD operations, JSON serialization, and best practices.

videos.title: localStorage in JavaScript: Complete Guide
videos.description: Brad Traversy covers everything from basic setItem/getItem to storing objects, iterating over keys, and building a mini-project with localStorage.

videos.title: localStorage Crash Course
videos.description: Kyle covers localStorage methods, JSON serialization, the storage event, and common pitfalls with clear visual examples.

videos.title: localStorage vs Session Storage — What's the Difference?
videos.description: Kevin explains the key differences between localStorage and sessionStorage with real-world use cases for each, including tab isolation and data persistence behavior.

videos.title: Building a Shopping Cart with localStorage
videos.description: Full project walkthrough building a persistent shopping cart application using localStorage, with add/remove items, quantity management, and total calculation.

videos.title: Cross-Tab Communication with localStorage Storage Event
videos.description: Learn how to use the storage event to synchronize state across multiple browser tabs or windows in real-time with practical demos.

videos.title: localStorage Security Best Practices
videos.description: Security-focused tutorial covering why you shouldn't store tokens in localStorage, XSS vulnerabilities, and alternatives like HttpOnly cookies.

videos.title: Full Stack Todo App with localStorage
videos.description: Build a complete todo application that uses localStorage for data persistence with features like categories, priorities, due dates, and search.
